title: Nurse Midwives
description: Diagnose and coordinate all aspects of the birthing process, either independently or as part of a healthcare team. May provide well-woman gynecological care. Must have specialized, graduate nursing education.

tasks.text: Provide prenatal, intrapartum, postpartum, or newborn care to patients.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor fetal development by listening to fetal heartbeat, taking external uterine measurements, identifying fetal position, or estimating fetal size and weight.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Document patients' health histories, symptoms, physical conditions, or other diagnostic information.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide patients with direct family planning services, such as inserting intrauterine devices, dispensing oral contraceptives, and fitting cervical barriers, including cervical caps or diaphragms.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prescribe medications as permitted by state regulations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop and implement individualized plans for health care management.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Explain procedures to patients, family members, staff members or others.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Order and interpret diagnostic or laboratory tests.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Initiate emergency interventions to stabilize patients.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Document findings of physical examinations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Educate patients and family members regarding prenatal, intrapartum, postpartum, newborn, or interconception care.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform physical examinations by taking vital signs, checking neurological reflexes, examining breasts, or performing pelvic examinations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Write information in medical records or provide narrative summaries to communicate patient information to other health care providers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide primary health care, including pregnancy and childbirth, to women.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Consult with or refer patients to appropriate specialists when conditions exceed the scope of practice or expertise.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Read current literature, talk with colleagues, or participate in professional organizations or conferences to keep abreast of developments in midwifery.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Instruct student nurse midwives, medical students, or residents on the birthing process.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Establish practice guidelines for specialty areas such as primary health care of women, care of the childbearing family, and newborn care.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan, provide, or evaluate educational programs for nursing staff, health care teams, or the community.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct clinical research on topics such as maternal or infant health care, contraceptive methods, breastfeeding, and gynecological care.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Manage newborn care during the first weeks of life.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
